description_long: This is a stylized, blocky bottle with a predominantly red cylindrical body and a dark brown base and neck, reminiscent of a pixel art or voxel design. The bottle features a prominent label on one side, displaying a white background with a bold, black and red graphic that appears to be a stylized logo or text. The neck of the bottle is stepped, transitioning from the wider body to a narrower top, and is capped with a matching red closure. On one side, there is a small, rectangular, metallic-looking patch, possibly representing a seal or additional label. The overall design is simple yet visually striking, with clean lines and a playful, digital aesthetic.
description: A blocky, red and brown bottle with a stepped neck, a bold graphic label, and a matching red cap, designed in a pixel art style.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from the side, showing a small metallic patch on the left and the stepped neck leading to the red cap.
description_view_1: This view shows the plain side of the bottle, with no visible label or patch, emphasizing the red cylindrical body and brown base.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals a larger metallic patch on the right, with the stepped neck and cap visible above.
description_view_3: The front view displays the main label with a bold, stylized graphic in black, white, and red, centered on the bottle's body.
attribute_label_or_branding: A bold, stylized black and red graphic on a white label, centered on the front of the bottle.
